description_long: This object is a compact firearm with a sleek, matte-black metal frame and a wooden grip panel on each side, featuring a visible magazine detached below the grip. The slide is smooth and streamlined, with minimal external features except for a rear sight and a hammer at the back. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionate, enclosing a single trigger. The magazine is rectangular and appears to be made of metal, designed to fit snugly into the grip. The overall design is ergonomic, with the wooden grip providing both aesthetic contrast and functional handling. The object is detailed with realistic texturing, especially on the wood and metal surfaces.
description: A compact, matte-black firearm with wooden grip panels and a detachable metal magazine, featuring a rounded trigger guard and streamlined design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the firearm, wooden grip panel, and detached magazine below the grip.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile, rear sight, and alignment of the magazine with the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other wooden grip panel and the magazine, mirroring the first side.
description_view_3: Front view showing the barrel opening, rounded trigger guard, and the magazine directly below the grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves or reinforcement
